title: Specklinia escalerensis
taxonomy: Specklinia escalerensis is classified in the kingdom Plantae, specifically within the phylum Ascomycota, class Ascomycetes, order Asparagales, family Orchidaceae, and subfamily Epidendroideae. This classification places it within the orchid family, which is a group of flowering plants known for their distinctive flowers and unique growth habits. The species is further classified within the genus Specklinia, which is a group of orchids native to Central and South America. Specklinia escalerensis is a type of epiphytic orchid, meaning it grows on other plants for support. The classification of Specklinia escalerensis provides insight into its evolutionary relationships and helps scientists understand its characteristics and behaviors.
